visual_analysis: The application features a clean and modern design with a dark background that enhances text visibility. The layout is well-organized, though it could benefit from more graphical elements or an illustrative context to increase engagement.
educational_analysis: While the title and description provide some insight into the concept of Greedy Algorithms, the lack of visual aids or interactive components limits its educational effectiveness. The absence of clear instructional elements or defined learning objectives diminishes its potential impact.
